docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT LIU, LISA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT NG, CHRISTOPHER $10,666.66 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,741.66, NO EXHIBITS OFFERED BY THE APPELLANT. EXHIBIT OFFERED BY RESPONDENT WAS RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS
SC-105 REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT NG, CHRISTOPHER AS TO PLAINTIFF LIU, LISA
REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (ANSWER) FILED BY RESPONDENT LIU, LISA
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SC-105A)DENIED*** BY REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIU, LISA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, CHRISTOPHER $10,666.66 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,741.66, MR. NG IS PAYING MS. LIU $1200.00 TODAY AND WILL PAY $1200.00 BY JUNE 15, EACH MONTH UNTIL PAID IN FULL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT NG, CHRISTOPHER MAILED TO RESPONDENT LIU, LISA
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2025 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (D206)
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2025 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON AUG-20-2025 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 503, JUDGE FENG. (206)
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-20-25 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 503

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-20-2025. SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JUN-17-2025 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. NO EXHIBITS FROM APPELLANT INTRODUCED. RESPONDENT'S EXHIBIT WAS RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG. CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA. MATTER NOT REPORTED. BAILIFF: NOT PRESENT. (503)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $ 0 SERVED APR-18-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NG, CHRISTOPHER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-17-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-17-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LISA LIU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER NG IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,666.66 FILED BY LIU, LISA AS TO DEFENDANT NG, CHRISTOPHER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-17-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
